# @univerjs-pro/license

[![npm version](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/@univerjs-pro/license?style=flat-square)](https://npmjs.com/package/@univerjs-pro/license)
[![downloads](https://img.shields.io/npm/dm/@univerjs-pro/license?style=flat-square)](https://npmjs.com/package/@univerjs-pro/license)

`@univerjs-pro/license` provides license management plugin and services for Univer Pro.

## Package Overview

| Package | UMD global | CSS | Locales | Facade entry |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | :---: |
| `@univerjs-pro/license` | `UniverProLicense` | No | No | No |

## Installation

```sh
pnpm add @univerjs-pro/license
# or
npm install @univerjs-pro/license
```

Keep all `@univerjs/*` and `@univerjs-pro/*` packages on the same version.

## Usage

```ts
import { UniverLicensePlugin } from '@univerjs-pro/license';

univer.registerPlugin(UniverLicensePlugin);
```

- [Documentation](https://docs.univer.ai/guides/pro)
